task.domains: (topic task) (topic hi-d) (topic ui-d) (topic sw-d) (topic indexing-d) (topic ut-d) a(base ishcondition) a(base varid) a(base varref) a(base cid) a(base partslist) (topic oce-d) (topic sdlVariables-c) (topic oceCommonElements-c) (topic oceMetaDecl-c) (topic oceTopic-c) (topic oceTopic-c task oceTask-c) (topic oceTopic-c hi-d oceHighlight-c) (topic oceTopic-c ui-d oceUi-c) (topic oceTopic-c sw-d oceSoftware-c)
task.title: What information is required when writing a Problem Report (PR)?

title.b: What information is required when writing a Problem Report (PR)?

section.p: A detailed description of the problem answering the following questions:

li.p: What is the problem exactly? (Which thing has which problem?)
Where do you see the problem?

section.p: Next depending on the nature of the problem, different kind of log files might be requested.
In any case the following files should be attached to the PR:
The files should be created as close as possible after the problem occurred.
The TraceData will be created automatically after an MRE (In this sample case the 7504 MRE.) and can be found in the log store (see picture).
Details regarding the Datalog files: See Log files and Colorado system
